## ERT1.2. Rate of planning via available airspace structures (PI#10)

*[Comment]{.underline}*

*ESTONIA mentions that the Data used and reported comes from NM.*

(Data source NM)

- the ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **23%** (via available restricted and segregated airspaces)

- the ratio of planning via available airspace structures is **15%** (via available conditional routes)
